ddls:
CREATE TABLE "commits" (
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commit */,
  "commit_message" TEXT /* Message describing the changes made in the commit */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who made the commit */,
  "commit_date" TEXT /* Date when the commit was made */,
  "repository_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository where the commit was made */,
  "lines_added" INTEGER /* Number of lines added in the commit */,
  "lines_removed" INTEGER /* Number of lines removed in the commit */,
  "branch_name" TEXT /* Name of the branch where the commit was made */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tag associated with the commit */,
  "change_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the change type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_change_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("change_type_id") REFERENCES change_types ("change_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_repository_id FOREIGN KEY ("repository_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repository_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the author within the development team */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the author joined the team */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the author belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repositories" (
  "repository_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repository */,
  "repository_name" TEXT /* Name of the repository */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the repository */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform the repository is hosted on (e.g., GitHub, Bitbucket) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the repository */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the repository was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the repository was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repository_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "files_changed" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file change entry */,
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commit associated with the file change */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file that was changed */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., added, modified, deleted) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Full path of the file */,
  "previous_file_name" TEXT /* Previous name of the file if it was renamed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_changed_commit_id FOREIGN KEY ("commit_id") REFERENCES commits ("commit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commit_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "repository_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository for which statistics are recorded */,
  "total_commits" INTEGER /* Total number of commits made */,
  "total_lines_added" INTEGER /* Total lines of code added */,
  "total_lines_removed" INTEGER /* Total lines of code removed */,
  "period" TEXT /* Time period for which the statistics are calculated */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commit_statistics_repository_id FOREIGN KEY ("repository_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repository_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "change_types" (
  "change_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change type */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change type (e.g., bugfix, feature, cosmetic) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the change type (e.g., bug, enhancement, documentation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role mapping */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the role assignment took effect */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the role assignment expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repository_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access entry */,
  "repository_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author accessing the repository */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions granted to the author */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Granular access level (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repository_access_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repository_access_repository_id FOREIGN KEY ("repository_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repository_id")
)
